---
title: "Multivariate Methods"
---

# Multivariate Methods {#sec-ch-08-multivariate}

Methods for high-dimensional data without an outcome variable: principal components, factor analysis, canonical correlation, linear discriminant analysis, hierarchical and partition clustering, UMAP, and t-SNE. Both the variance-explained and the visual-projection use cases are covered.

This chapter contains **30 method pages** and **3 labs**. If you are not sure which method to read, return to [Chapter 0](../../ch00-find-your-method.qmd) and follow the decision tree to the right node.

## Method pages

| Method | Source slug |
|---|---|
| [Bray-Curtis Dissimilarity](bray-curtis.qmd) | `bray-curtis` |
| [Canonical Correlation Analysis](canonical-correlation.qmd) | `canonical-correlation` |
| [Cluster Validation: Silhouette](cluster-validation-silhouette.qmd) | `cluster-validation-silhouette` |
| [Confirmatory Factor Analysis](factor-analysis-confirmatory.qmd) | `factor-analysis-confirmatory` |
| [Correspondence Analysis](correspondence-analysis.qmd) | `correspondence-analysis` |
| [DBSCAN Clustering](dbscan-clustering.qmd) | `dbscan-clustering` |
| [Distance and Dissimilarity Measures](distance-measures.qmd) | `distance-measures` |
| [Exploratory Factor Analysis](factor-analysis-exploratory.qmd) | `factor-analysis-exploratory` |
| [Factor Rotation](factor-rotation.qmd) | `factor-rotation` |
| [Gaussian Mixture Models](gaussian-mixture-models.qmd) | `gaussian-mixture-models` |
| [Hierarchical Clustering](hierarchical-clustering.qmd) | `hierarchical-clustering` |
| [Independent Component Analysis](ica-independent-component-analysis.qmd) | `ica-independent-component-analysis` |
| [Jaccard and Dice Dissimilarity](jaccard-dissimilarity.qmd) | `jaccard-dissimilarity` |
| [k-Means Clustering](kmeans-clustering.qmd) | `kmeans-clustering` |
| [Kernel PCA](kernel-pca.qmd) | `kernel-pca` |
| [Linear Discriminant Analysis](linear-discriminant-analysis.qmd) | `linear-discriminant-analysis` |
| [Mahalanobis Distance](mahalanobis-distance.qmd) | `mahalanobis-distance` |
| [MANOVA](manova.qmd) | `manova` |
| [Metric Multidimensional Scaling](mds-metric.qmd) | `mds-metric` |
| [Multiple Correspondence Analysis](multiple-correspondence-analysis.qmd) | `multiple-correspondence-analysis` |
| [Non-Metric Multidimensional Scaling](mds-nonmetric.qmd) | `mds-nonmetric` |
| [Partial Least Squares Regression](pls-regression.qmd) | `pls-regression` |
| [Partitioning Around Medoids](pam-kmedoids.qmd) | `pam-kmedoids` |
| [PLS Discriminant Analysis](pls-da.qmd) | `pls-da` |
| [Principal Component Analysis](principal-component-analysis.qmd) | `principal-component-analysis` |
| [Quadratic Discriminant Analysis](quadratic-discriminant-analysis.qmd) | `quadratic-discriminant-analysis` |
| [Structural Equation Models](structural-equation-models.qmd) | `structural-equation-models` |
| [The Elbow Method](elbow-method.qmd) | `elbow-method` |
| [The Gap Statistic](gap-statistic.qmd) | `gap-statistic` |
| [UMAP and t-SNE: Overview](umap-tsne-overview.qmd) | `umap-tsne-overview` |

## Labs

| # | Lab | Course / week / session |
|---|---|---|
| C4.3 | [Week 1, Session 3 â€” PCA, factor analysis, CCA, LDA](labs/lab-pca-factor-analysis-cca-lda.qmd) | Course 4, week 1, session 3 |
| C4.4 | [Week 1, Session 4 â€” Clustering: k-means, hierarchical, model-based](labs/lab-clustering-k-means-hierarchical-model-based.qmd) | Course 4, week 1, session 4 |
| C4.5 | [Week 1, Session 5 â€” UMAP and t-SNE](labs/lab-umap-and-t-sne.qmd) | Course 4, week 1, session 5 |
